symbols: torchlight in darkness — fleeting illumination amid moral obscurity
masked and costumed figures — the concealment of identity in revelry
description: A dark interior scene illuminated by a single torch held by a figure at far left. At center, a man in a red-orange costume with puffy breeches and a turban-like headdress strikes a dramatic dancing pose with arms raised. Another costumed figure bends forward beside him. Additional figures in elaborate costumes with feathered hats and theatrical dress cluster at right and in the shadows. The scene is dominated by deep darkness with the warm torchlight picking out the performers' costumes and faces in dramatic chiaroscuro.
